/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/example.dir/src/example.c.o -o example  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/vault/git/libuvc/build libuvc.0.0.6.dylib
